mapper.select: Select m.memberId , mi.nameH , (select count(*) from loan l where m.memberNo = l.memberNo and l.requeststate in ('2','3','4')) as loanCount , (select count(*) from loan l where m.memberNo = l.memberNo and l.requeststate = '5') as entiCount from member m, memberinfo mi where m.memberId = #{memberId}
